title: FPSCore
description: A pure performance core for maximum FPS.
body:
**A powerful, fast, and perfectly fine tuned Modpack that has no visual diference.** 

![Goes up to 900+ FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eff77893c9a2b6e7eefffc8d2422be36322d568_0.webp)





⚙️ FPSCore

Pure performance is what FPSCore is. The sole purpose of this modpack for Minecraft: Java Edition is to maximize frame rate while minimizing gameplay impact.

No tricks. No extraneous features.
Just a core that is optimized, clean, and fast.

What FPSCore Does:

significantly increases stability and frame rate

minimizes memory, CPU, and GPU overhead

enhances game logic, chunk loading, and rendering.

maintains the game's compatibility and vanilla feel

A mod doesn't belong here if it doesn't enhance performance.

Design Philosophy:

FPSCore is constructed similarly to an engine

No Downsides

Effective

Dependable

Each mod is picked for actual, quantifiable performance improvements.
Nothing novel. There was no bloating.

Who Should Use This Pack?

Older or low-end computers

Players with high refresh rates who strive for fluid frames

PvP, survival, and technical players

Anyone who simply wants Minecraft to function better

Characteristics:

Optimization mods chosen with care

Safe defaults—no dangerous adjustments

Suitable for the majority of servers

Excellent as a base pack for personalization

What FPSCore Is Not:

Not a pack of shaders

Not a redesign of the graphics

Not a modpack for a kitchen sink

The bottom line

FPSCore reduces Minecraft to its core, which is its most effective form.
Launch it, install it, and notice the difference.

What:

One of the MOST Optimized Modpacks that dosent effect visuals, can give over 900+ FPS but gives atleast 250+ FPS on the lowest end devices (Laptops, Bad PCs, Chromebook, Old Laptops/Computers).

Why:

Created by someone who is frantically finding the best optimization tactics and mods for low end devices, high end devices, and all of the imbetween.

How much performance:

Up to and can be higher than 900 FPS at 36 render distance.
